# Free SEO & GEO Crawler

> A comprehensive, open-source SEO and AI search (GEO) auditing tool built with Go and Astro. Analyze any website for 200+ checks across technical SEO, on-page optimization, performance, security, structured data, and generative engine optimization.

## Documentation

- [Getting Started](/docs/getting-started): Installation and setup guide
- [Web UI Guide](/docs/web-ui): How to use the web interface
- [CI/CD SDK](/docs/sdk): Integrate SEO checks in your deployment pipeline
- [Rules Reference](/docs/rules): All 130+ audit rules explained with fix guidance
- [Rule Presets](/docs/presets): Pre-configured rule groups for common use cases
- [Localhost Crawling](/docs/localhost): Test your development server before deploying
- [API Reference](/docs/api): REST API endpoints for programmatic access

## Key Features

- 130+ audit rules across 15 categories
- GEO (Generative Engine Optimization) checks for AI search readiness
- Real-time progress with Server-Sent Events
- Export reports as CSV or Markdown
- CI/CD SDK for deployment pipelines
- Localhost crawling support
- Sitemap analysis with orphan page detection
